description: Simmons manages to contact Agent Weaver at the S.H.I.E.L.D. Academy, who warns her about the Hydra coup sweeping through S.H.I.E.L.D. Triplett and Simmons barricade themselves in a lab, trusting each other under suspicion. The warning not to trust anyone leaves them rattled, underscoring the paranoia and danger of the moment.

transcript.line: You're positive this line is secure?
Yeah, but be quick. Nothing looks more guilty than sneaking around.
Well, I sent her a request. She must not have... Agent Weaver, thank you for joining me. I'd been hop...
Jemma. Thank god you're still alive.
The Hub still secure? Are you with your team? Get somewhere safe and lock the door.
Have your commander report that the academy is under sieze. We don't know how long Hydra's been inside S.H.I.E.L.D. They are taking control!
Everywhere! Among us! If you survive, you know where to find me. Jemma, don't trust anyone!
What the lady said to do, locking the door.
Go ahead. This door won't hold if they come looking, but they won't come around this way for a little while. I'm staying.
Well, how do I... know I can trust you?

Because I'm trustworthy. You're the one who works for the zombie robot back from the dead. Take it. If you try to kill me with it, I'll know I can't trust you. Now fire that thing back up. Let's see if we can get our friends on the line. Can't wait to tell them the good news.
